name: Sansan MCP
description: Business card management and CRM. Scan business cards, manage contacts, track meeting history. Ideal for Japanese B2B sales workflows.

name: HubSpot Japan MCP
description: CRM, marketing automation, and sales pipeline management. Japanese-localized HubSpot integration with deal tracking and email sequences.

name: Backlog MCP
description: Project management by Nulab. Create issues, manage sprints, track bugs, wiki documentation. Popular in Japanese dev teams.

name: Jooto MCP
description: Kanban-style project management. Create boards, tasks, labels, and track progress. Simple UI designed for Japanese teams.

name: Chatwork MCP
description: Business messaging platform dominant in Japanese companies. Send messages, manage rooms, share files, create tasks within chats.

name: LINE WORKS MCP
description: Enterprise messaging by LINE. Send messages, manage groups, bots, calendar, and drive. Strong in Japanese and Korean markets.

name: freee MCP
description: Cloud accounting and invoicing for Japanese businesses. Create invoices, manage expenses, tax filing support, bank sync.

name: Money Forward MCP
description: Cloud accounting, expense management, and payroll. Automates bookkeeping with AI-powered categorization for Japanese businesses.

name: SmartHR MCP
description: HR management platform. Employee onboarding, document management, social insurance procedures, annual adjustment for Japanese labor law.

name: KING OF TIME MCP
description: Attendance and time tracking. Clock in/out, shift management, overtime calculation, leave requests. Japanese labor law compliant.

name: BASE MCP
description: E-commerce platform. Manage products, orders, inventory, customers. Easy store setup popular with Japanese small businesses.

name: STORES MCP
description: E-commerce and POS platform. Online store, physical store POS, reservations, payments. Unified commerce for Japanese market.
